violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Plywood where TV and menu stuff attached must be sealed to be cleanable & non-absorbent.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Using low splash bleach. Use regular unscented bleach.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Use quat tabs for sanitizer. Lemon scent wipes are not permitted.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sink was full of personal items. Freezer blocks access.
